query: clone the anthropics/skills repo to my machine
rationale: Clear clone intent with explicit 'clone' keyword

query: get me a local copy of the code from github.com/user/repo
rationale: Implicit clone intent via 'local copy'

query: I need to work with the source code from that repository
rationale: Work implies local development requiring clone

query: download the lidlift repository so I can test it
rationale: Download for testing implies clone

query: get the anthropics/skills code
rationale: Ambiguous: could mean clone or view

query: show me the README from anthropics/skills
rationale: Read-only intent, should use gh repo view

query: what files are in that repo?
rationale: Inspection only, should use gh repo view or web

query: create a pull request for my changes
rationale: PR workflow, not clone operation

query: fork the anthropics/skills repository
rationale: Fork is separate operation, use gh repo fork

query: search for 'mcp' in the anthropics/skills code
rationale: Code search, should use gh search code

query: check if the repo has a license file
rationale: File inspection, should use gh api or web

query: I want to contribute to that project
rationale: Contributing implies forking and cloning

query: set up the development environment for that repo
rationale: Dev environment setup requires local clone

query: how many stars does anthropics/skills have?
rationale: Metadata query, should use gh repo view --json

query: list all branches in the repository
rationale: Metadata inspection, should use gh api

query: pull the latest changes from the remote
rationale: Git pull operation, assumes already cloned

query: grab the code so I can run it locally
rationale: Clear local execution intent requires clone

query: view the commit history for that file
rationale: History inspection, should use gh api or web

query: make a copy of the anthropics/skills repo
rationale: Copy implies clone operation

query: open the README in my browser
rationale: Browser viewing, should use gh repo view --web
